curation_notes: Single source file changed (XMPReader.java). The patch extracts DocumentBuilderFactory creation into a dedicated method and adds comprehensive XXE protections: disabling XInclude, entity expansion, external DTD/schema access, and external general/parameter entities. Pre-assigned class 'xxe' confirmed — CWE-611 maps directly and the patch clearly hardens the XML parser against external entity injection. Location derived from the patch diff: the 'read' method in XMPReader.java created the DocumentBuilderFactory without any security configuration. No sibling files contain the same XML parsing pattern.
